replication_study.hypothesis: Participants who believe they are being socially observed will make a higher proportion of deontological (harm-rejecting) judgments than control participants, with the effect being strongest for personal moral dilemmas (i.e., a Condition × Dilemma-Type interaction on RH variables).

data_plan.source_type: Laboratory experiment dataset saved in SPSS format
data_plan.sample_size: To be read programmatically from the .sav (expected N ≈ 40-60)

qualification.explanation: The SCORE dataset reproduces the original experimental design (same tasks, variables, coding) on a new independent sample, providing a high-fidelity but genuinely new test of the claim.
qualification.similarity_to_original: Identical variables RH_PMD, RH_NMD, RH_CMD and between-subject Condition are defined in SCORE_syntax.sps (§“MORAL DILEMMAS – main task”) exactly as in the original methods (post_registration.json ‘method’ section).
qualification.deviation_from_original: Original study used 48 Korean students (post_registration.json ‘data’). The SCORE dataset is a separate sample collected under the SCORE programme (file provenance ‘replication_data’), likely from a different country/lab, thus constituting an independent replication.

data_plan.notes: File is SPSS .sav; will be read with pyreadstat. Variable labels are in English; no nested structure. All paths converted to /app/data for execution.

steps: Select variables: Condition (between), RH_PMD, RH_NMD, RH_CMD (within).
Run mixed-design ANOVA (Condition between; dilemma_type within) using pingouin or statsmodels.
Extract F, p, and partial eta-squared for the interaction.
planned_method.control_variables: None (design already randomised); baseline variables available if robustness checks needed.
planned_method.tools_software: Python 3.10; pandas, numpy, pyreadstat, pingouin (or statsmodels), matplotlib/seaborn

planned_estimation_and_test.estimation: Partial eta squared for Condition × Dilemma-Type interaction

planned_method.missing_data_handling: Listwise deletion of participants with any missing RH variables
planned_method.inference_criteria: Significant if p < 0.05 and direction matches original (Observed > Control specifically in Personal dilemmas)

files.load_and_anova.py: Loads the .sav, reshapes data, performs the mixed ANOVA, prints F, p, eta², and saves a CSV of results in /app/data.

codebase.notes: All file IO hard-coded to /app/data paths. Script uses a fixed random seed only if resampling is added later.

analysis.comparison_metrics: Compare F-value, p-value, and partial eta-squared of the Condition × Dilemma-Type interaction with original (F=4.779, p=.014, η²=.094). Directionality (Observed > Control in Personal dilemmas) must be matched.
